languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

languages.text: {n}Ксенос бросает на вас взгляд — взгляд существа столь древнего и могущественного, что вы почти что ощущаете его физически.{/n} "Сам факт того, что ты оказал{mf|ся|ась} здесь, выделяет тебя среди прочих вредителей. Занятное упорство и отсутствие навыка прогнозирования последствий... хотя, быть может, ты даже не представлял{mf||а}, с чем связываешься".

{n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."
languages.original_text: {n}Ксенос бросает на вас взгляд — взгляд существа столь древнего и могущественного, что вы почти что ощущаете его физически.{/n} "Сам факт того, что ты оказал{mf|ся|ась} здесь, выделяет тебя среди прочих вредителей. Занятное упорство и отсутствие навыка прогнозирования последствий... хотя, быть может, ты даже не представлял{mf||а}, с чем связываешься".

Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

{n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

languages.text: {n}異形はあなたを見つめた。その視線は、古く、強く、まるで物理的な重みのように感じられる。{/n}「あなたがここにたどり着いたという事実は、他の害虫とは違う。好奇心と先見の欠如...だが、あなたが自分が陥る状況を理解していなかったのかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here already sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

traits.locale_text: {n}異形はあなたを見つめた。その視線は、古く、強く、まるで物理的な重みのように感じられる。{n}「あなたがここにたどり着いたという事実は、他の害虫とは違う。好奇心と先見の欠如...だが、あなたが自分が陥る状況を理解していなかったのかもしれない。」

languages.text: {n}异形将目光投向了你，那目光来自如此古老、如此强大的存在，你几乎能感受到它实实在在的重量。{/n}“竟然能摸到这里来，至少这说明你们跟别的害虫不同。执着得有趣，却又鼠目寸光……也是，或许你们根本不知道自己都惹了什么麻烦。”
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

traits.locale_text: {n}异形将目光投向了你，那目光来自如此古老、如此强大的存在，你几乎能感受到它实实在在的重量。{/n}“竟然能摸到这里来，至少这说明你们跟别的害虫不同。执着得有趣，却又鼠目寸光……也是，或许你们根本不知道自己都惹了什么麻烦。”

languages.text: {n}El xenos fija su mirada en ti: es la mirada de un ser tan antiguo y poderoso que casi puedes sentirla físicamente sobre tu cuerpo.{/n} «El mero hecho de que hayáis llegado hasta aquí os hace distintos a las otras alimañas. Una determinación curiosa y una falta de previsión... No obstante, es posible que no tuvierais la menor idea de dónde os estabais adentrando».
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

traits.locale_text: {n}El xenos fija su mirada en ti: es la mirada de un ser tan antiguo y poderoso que casi puedes sentirla físicamente sobre tu cuerpo.{/n} «El mero hecho de que hayáis llegado hasta aquí os hace distintos a las otras alimañas. Una determinación curiosa y una falta de previsión... No obstante, es posible que no tuvierais la menor idea de dónde os estabais adentrando».

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos richtet seinen Blick auf dich, den Blick eines Wesens, das so alt und mächtig ist, dass du ihn beinahe als körperliches Gewicht spüren kannst.{/n} "Allein der Umstand, dass du den Weg hierher gefunden hast, hebt dich von anderen Schädlingen ab. Neugierige Entschlossenheit und ein Mangel an Weitblick ... andererseits wusstest du vielleicht gar nicht, worauf du dich einlässt."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos richtet seinen Blick auf dich, den Blick eines Wesens, das so alt und mächtig ist, dass du ihn beinahe als körperliches Gewicht spüren kannst.{/n} "Allein der Umstand, dass du den Weg hierher gefunden hast, hebt dich von anderen Schädlingen ab. Neugierige Entschlossenheit und ein Mangel an Weitblick ... andererseits wusstest du vielleicht gar nicht, worauf du dich einlässt."

languages.text: {n}Le xénos tourne son regard vers vous, le regard d'un être si ancien et si puissant que vous le sentez presque peser sur vous.{/n} « Le simple fait que vous ayez réussi à venir ici vous distingue des autres vermines. Une curieuse détermination et un manque de clairvoyance... Enfin, vous n'imaginiez peut-être pas dans quoi vous vous embarquiez. »
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos turns his gaze on you, the gaze of a being so ancient and powerful that you almost feel it as a physical weight.{/n} "The very fact of your finding your way here sets you apart from other pests. Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos tourne son regard vers vous, le regard d'un être si ancien et si puissant que vous le sentez presque peser sur vous.{/n} « Le simple fait que vous ayez réussi à venir ici vous distingue des autres vermines. Une curieuse détermination et un manque de clairvoyance... Enfin, vous n'imaginiez peut-être pas dans quoi vous vous embarquiez. »

languages.text: {n}Zeno, bakışlarını sana çeviriyor. O kadar kadim ve güçlü bir varlık ki bakışlarını âdeta fiziksel bir ağırlık olarak hissediyorsun.{/n} "Buranın yolunu bulmanız, sizi diğer böceklerden ayırıyor. İlginç bir kararlılık ve öngörü eksikliği... Gerçi belki de neye bulaştığınızı bilmiyordunuz."

Curious determination and lack of foresight... then again, perhaps you had no notion of what you were getting into."
